content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.37%, IT crashing -5.47%, VIX +6.4% to 19.78 — clear risk-off session. Market is broad-based weak with only pockets of strength (pharma, defense, specialty chem). Book already 68% deployed with net flat P&L; deployment hysteresis rule applies — default should be position management over new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results strong (+35% PAT, GNPA 1.45%), broker upgrades to Rs 90. Price holding above SL 74.50 at CMP 76.84. Thesis intact despite drawdown; PSU bank sector still in uptrend. SL already tight at ~3% from CMP — no merit to tightening further or exiting now. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1013.22,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position up +4.7%, momentum strong with +2.66% today. Current SL at 1013.22 is already ~2% below CMP 1034.60, effectively locking in ~3% gain above entry. This is already appropriately trailed — emitting HOLD instead as MODIFY with identical values is no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, small -0.8% drawdown. SL at 119 gives adequate room. In current high-VIX environment, gold hedge is valuable. Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock at 52-week high 1417.90, FMCG showing defensive bid. Move SL from 1405 to breakeven 1412.94 — protects against reversal while letting winner run. Q4 results strong, rural premiumization theme intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Stock near 52-week high 1059 with strong relative strength vs banking sector. Move SL from 1045 to breakeven 1049.05 to lock in cost. Q4 audited results Apr 27 is binary event — tight stop prudent. Keeps upside open."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Up +0.4%, near 52-week high 696. Q4 results Apr 29 is binary event with FDA warning letter overhang. SL at 672 = ~1.8% from CMP, already tight. Hold into results; if gap down, SL triggers cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.6%, FMCG mixed today (HUL -2.41% while Nestle +0.52%). SL 2260 gives adequate buffer (~2.2% below CMP). Q4 results Apr 30 is a catalyst. Thesis intact — hold; no early exit warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-1.0% drawdown, consolidating near 400. SL at 393 provides ~1.8% buffer. Power sector still favored, Q4 results May 15. Hold as-is; no modification needed."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact despite drawdown. SL at 74.50 is ~3% below CMP — appropriate. Q4 was strong; let it play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1013.22 which is above entry 984 — breakeven-plus already locked. No further tightening needed at this level as stock is mid-session and room needed for noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, current SL appropriate for ETF volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven; stock at 52-week high, FMCG defensive theme. Lock in cost ahead of Apr 30 earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven ahead of Apr 27 Q4 audited results — binary event risk warrants cost protection."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Already tight SL at 672. Q4 Apr 29 binary event with FDA warning letter overhang — do not widen; existing SL will act cleanly on gap-down."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater but within tolerance. SL 2260 below recent swing, Q4 Apr 30 is catalyst. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor drawdown, SL appropriate, Q4 mid-May. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL, COCHINSHIP, ONESOURCE, EMCURE all look extended after multi-day rallies on risk-off day — classic late-session chase setups, skipping. NMDC metals strength interesting but sector-rotation signal not strong enough to add. CLEAN volume anomaly was not provided in deep-dive data. Watch Apr 27 AUBANK, Apr 29 GRANULES, Apr 30 HINDUNILVR/NESTLEIND earnings for post-result setups.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed with 8 CNC positions. Per deployment hysteresis rule and cautious market (VIX +6.4%, IT -5.5%, Nifty -1.4%), default stance is NO new entries. Focus shifted entirely to position management: trailed SL to breakeven on NESTLEIND and AUBANK (both near 52-week highs with binary Q4 events imminent). MAHABANK is the weak link at -5.8% — monitoring closely but thesis intact with strong results. Cluster watch: 3 financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) = ~33% of deployed capital — at cluster limit, no more financials. Pharma cluster (GRANULES) is only 6%. Priority over next 3 sessions is managing through Q4 earnings gauntlet — prefer locking in gains over hunting new breakouts."
}
